content.text:
Perfect! Here's the exact location of the AreasToTCP block and the lines immediately following it:

## AreasToTCP Block Location

**The AreasToTCP block ends at line 784.** Here are the details:

**AreasToTCP Block (lines 771-784):**
```vb
771  'TCP CONNECTIONS
772  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP = New DataTable
773  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("AreaID", GetType(Integer))
774  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("Side", GetType(String))
775  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("IP", GetType(String))
776  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("Port", GetType(String))
777  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("Timer", GetType(Integer))
778  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("CLIENT_OR_SERVER", GetType(String))
779  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("TCP_TYPE", GetType(String))
780  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP.Columns.Add("SLAVE", GetType(Integer))
781  Dim dt_tcprequired As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AreaID],[Side],[IP],[Port],[Timer],[CLIENT_OR_SERVER],[TCP_TYPE],[SLAVE] FROM [PART_OPERATION_AREAS_TCP] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "' AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' AND Side='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "'")
782  If dt_tcprequired.Rows.Count > 0 Then
783      ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToTCP = dt_tcprequired
784  End If
```

**Lines Following the Block (lines 785-809):**
```vb
785
786
787  'IGNORE RECORD OF FAILURES IF PASS BEFORE
788  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass = New DataTable

790  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Columns.Add("Area", GetType(String))

793  If dt_areastoignorefailures.Rows.Count > 0 Then

795  End If
796

799  Dim dtSegregateUnitsLocked As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID] FROM [Part_Operation_UnitsLocks_Segregate] WHERE [PartID]='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "' and AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and Side='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "'")
800  If dtSegregateUnitsLocked.Rows.Count > 0 Then
801      ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.SegregateQAUnits = True
802  End If
803
```

- **AreasToTCP block ends:** Line 784 (`End If`)
- **Blank lines after block:** Lines 785-786
